title: cyclosorus crinipes
intro: Cyclosorus crinipes, also known as the Chinese water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus crinipes include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to leverage its medicinal properties.
